title: Weather: Partly cloudy but fair on Tuesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - No weather...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - No weather warnings have been issued by the South African Weather Service for Tuesday 19 August.

The overall forecast for the region is fine, becoming partly cloudy from the afternoon.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeMorning fog patches over the western parts, otherwise cloudy with light rain over the south-western parts, clearing in the afternoon. It will become fine and cold to cool but fine in the north-eastern parts.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate northerly to north-westerly, but westerly to south-westerly along the south coast. The expected UVB sunburn index: Low

Western half of the Eastern CapeFog in places in the south in the morning, otherwise fine and cool, becoming partly cloudy with isolated showers along the coast towards evening.

The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly reaching strong in places, becoming light westerly in the evening.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFog in places in the southwest in the morning, otherwise fine and cool, becoming partly cloudy to cloudy with isolated showers and thundershowers in the south and east from the afternoon.

The wind along the coast will be light westerly at first, otherwise moderate to fresh south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures on Tuesday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
